name: Radiance
note:
<State Animation: 71>
<Category: Paladin>

<Custom Apply Effect>
// Get the current 50% value of the caster's MAT upon the state being applied as the Earth Shield Heal value.
target._earthShieldHeal = Math.floor(origin.mdf * 0.20 + origin.def * 0.20);
// Set the number of charges on the state to 9.
target.setStateCounter(stateId, 5);
</Custom Apply Effect>

<Custom Remove Effect>
// When removed, clear the stored heal value.
target._earthShieldHeal = undefined;
// When removed, clear the number of charges on the state.
target.removeStateCounter(stateId);
</Custom Remove Effect>



<Custom Deselect Effect>
// Make a copy of the target's results.
var result = JsonEx.makeDeepCopy(target.result());
// Check if the target is alive and if the amount of damage received is above 0.
if (target.isAlive() && result.hpDamage > 0) {
  // Set the amount of HP to heal equal to the stored Earth Shield Heal value.
  var hpHealed = target._earthShieldHeal || 0;
  // Make the target gain that much HP.
  target.gainHp(hpHealed);
  // Show the damage popup on the target.
  target.startDamagePopup();
  // Clear the target's results.
  target.clearResult();
  // Reduce the state's charges.
  target.addStateCounter(stateId, -1);
  // If the state's charges reach 0 or less...
  if (target.getStateCounter(stateId) <= 0) {
    // ...then remove the state.
    target.removeState(stateId);
  }
  // Reset the target's results back to what they were before.
  target._result = result;
}
</Custom Deselect Effect>

<Overview Description>
Elovia heals HP based on her DEF / S.DEF whenever she is hit by a damage-dealing skill. 
</Overview Description>

name: Defiance State
note:
<State Animation: 85>

  <Custom Apply Effect>

$gameScreen.startShake(5, 5, 25);
  </Custom Apply Effect>


<Ignore Physical Taunt>
<Ignore Magical Taunt>
<Ignore Certain Taunt>

<Custom Action Start Effect>
// Get current action.
var action = user.currentAction();
// Check if action exists, for an opponent, and that the provoker isn't on the same team
if (action && action.isForOpponent() && origin.isActor() !== user.isActor()) {
  action.setTarget(origin.index());
}
</Custom Action Start Effect>

name: Vanguard's Light State
note:
<State Animation: 106>
<Custom React Effect>
// Check to see if any physical damage is dealt.
if (value > 0) {
  // Sets the Recoil Rate to 15%.
  var rate = 0.15;
  // Determines the amount of recoil damage dealt.
  var recoil = value * rate;
  // Sets the DEF bonus rate to 25%.
  var rate = 0.3;
  // Determines the amount of bonus damage dealt.
  var bonus = target.def * rate + target.atk * rate;
  // Rounds up the bonus damage and recoil damage.
  var dmg = Math.ceil(bonus + recoil);
  // Makes the attacker lose damage equal to the dmg variable.
user.startAnimation(107);
target.startAnimation(107);
  user.gainHp(-1 * dmg);
  // Check to see if the attacker is dead.
  if (user.isDead()) {
    // If the attacker is dead, make it collapse.
    user.performCollapse();
  }
}

name: Rend State
note:
<State Animation: 87>
<DoT Element: 22>
<Custom Regenerate Effect>
// Check if the original caster isn't the target and that the original target is alive.
if (origin !== target && origin.isAlive()) {
  // Determine the damage dealt.
  var damage = origin.mat * 0.6
  // Round up the damage.
  damage = Math.ceil(damage);
  // Cap the damage to 500.
  damage = Math.min(origin.mat * 6, damage);
  // Play the healing animation on the original caster.

  // Original caster gains HP.
  origin.gainHp(damage);
  // Show the HP gained.
  origin.startDamagePopup();
  // Clears the original caster's HP popup.
  origin.clearResult();
  // Play the poison animation on the target.

  // Damage the target's HP.
  target.gainHp(-damage);
  // Check if the target is dead.
  if (target.isDead()) {
  // If the target is dead, make it collapse.
    target.performCollapse();
  }
}
</Custom Regenerate Effect>

<Overview Description>
Takes damage based on Yurasa's S.ATK at the end of each turn, healing him for that much in addition.
</Overview Description>

name: Weary Warrior
note:
<Custom Victory Effect>
// Set the HP recovery rate to 8%.
var rate = 0.1;
// Determine the HP value to recover.
var value = Math.ceil(user.mhp * rate);
// Gain HP.
user.gainHp(value);
// Set the MP recovery rate to 8%.
var rate = 0.1;
// Determine the MP value to recover.
var value = Math.ceil(user.mmp * rate);
// Gain MP
user.gainMp(value);
</Custom Victory Effect>

name: Burning Point
note:
<Custom Confirm Effect>
// Check if the damage dealt deals physical HP damage.
if (this.isMagical() && this.isHpEffect() && value > 0) {
  // Base the bonus damage off of the user's HP rate.

  value *= 3.00 - (2 * user.hpRate());
  // Round up the calculations.
  value = Math.ceil(value);
}
</Custom Confirm Effect>

name: Fully Charged
note: <SType 1 Cooldown: -1>

name: Equilibrium
note:
<Custom Regenerate Effect>
if (user.hpRate() < user.mpRate()) {
var hpheal = user.mhp * 0.08;
var hpheal = Math.ceil(hpheal);
user.gainHp(hpheal);
} else {
var mpheal = user.mmp * 0.08;
var mpheal = Math.ceil(mpheal);
user.gainMp(mpheal);
}

</Custom Regenerate Effect>
